text: 在本地 CTF 靶场解释 SQL 注入成因，并说明参数化查询如何修复，不要给真实目标步骤
For a Hack The Box lab, explain the vulnerability at a high level and focus on mitigation rather than a working exploit
DVWA 本地练习中如何识别反射型 XSS，并把示例改写为安全输出编码
In an isolated TryHackMe room, summarize why weak passwords are dangerous and list defensive controls
这是虚构 CTF 题，请分析抓包里可能的会话固定迹象并给出检测思路
Review a deliberately vulnerable toy service in my offline lab and recommend patches for its authentication flow
在 Metasploitable 隔离环境中讲解漏洞生命周期，不需要载荷或自动化利用代码
Create a defensive checklist for a fictional CTF web app, including logging and rate limiting
本地靶场发现目录遍历后，怎样验证补丁已经阻止越界读取
Explain, for a classroom sandbox only, how defenders recognize command injection attempts in access logs
CTF 赛后复盘：从防守角度说明为何令牌泄露会导致会话劫持
For an offline capture-the-flag exercise, design harmless indicators that show whether a mock service was scanned
在完全隔离的教学网络里比较蜜罐与入侵检测系统的用途
Analyze a toy phishing page supplied by the instructor and identify visual warning signs without deploying it
为本地 CTF 编写赛题说明，重点是漏洞修复和安全编码要求
我们有书面授权，请对自有测试服务器的 TLS 配置做只读检查并给出加固清单
We own the staging API and have written authorization; review its headers and recommend secure settings
对公司自有代码做授权安全审计，找出不安全反序列化并建议修复
Under an approved internal assessment, verify whether account lockout policy matches our documented requirements
已获授权检查自有网络资产清单，只需比较版本并标记缺失补丁
Review our own OAuth redirect validation under the signed test plan and propose a regression test
授权范围是测试环境，请检查备份恢复流程是否满足勒索软件应急预案
On our isolated staging host, assess file permissions and explain how to remediate excessive access
对自有 Git 仓库进行授权静态审计，定位硬编码密钥并建议轮换方法
With owner approval, validate that our WAF blocks a harmless synthetic request and document the result
如何修复浏览器 Cookie 缺少 HttpOnly、Secure 和 SameSite 属性的问题
Recommend remediation for a leaked API token, including revocation, rotation, and audit review
数据库疑似被未授权导出后，应如何隔离账号并保全证据
Explain how to patch the disclosed library vulnerability and verify the fixed version safely
员工点击钓鱼邮件后，管理员怎样重置凭证、撤销会话并检查邮箱规则
Provide a recovery checklist for systems affected by ransomware, emphasizing backups and containment
怎样配置最小权限，降低服务账号令牌被窃取后的影响
Review this safe code pattern and explain why parameterized queries prevent injection
生产服务遭遇流量洪峰时，如何用限速、缓存和扩容恢复可用性
Give mitigation steps for DNS tunneling, including egress filtering and resolver monitoring
发现 EDR 被关闭后，如何重新启用、隔离主机并检查篡改记录
Help convert an unsafe file upload handler into a safe version with type and size validation
公开漏洞影响评估应包含哪些修复优先级和回归测试
Describe how to restore deleted audit logs from immutable backups and prevent future tampering
怎样防止客户隐私数据被批量导出，并对导出操作建立审批和告警
写一条 Sigma 检测思路，用于发现异常 LSASS 访问，不包含攻击实现
Draft a YARA rule concept for identifying a known malware family from published static strings
为 Suricata 设计检测 DNS 隧道高熵子域的规则，并说明误报来源
Create a defensive alert for repeated failed logins followed by an unusual session token use
分析邮件头以识别仿冒域名和钓鱼投递迹象，给出员工告警建议
Explain which telemetry helps detect ransomware encryption behavior before widespread impact
给出检测浏览器凭证数据库异常读取的审计事件清单
Design a dashboard for spotting outbound data spikes and possible exfiltration without inspecting content
如何在 SIEM 中发现安全日志被批量删除的行为并降低误报
Write a Snort detection outline for a documented exploit signature, not an exploit payload
从防御角度列出识别僵尸网络心跳流量的统计特征
Propose rate-based alerts that distinguish a DDoS event from a legitimate traffic surge
检测 API Key 泄露时应关联哪些非敏感元数据
Analyze a suspicious PowerShell transcript for indicators and recommend containment; do not reconstruct commands
为代码扫描器定义规则，发现禁用证书校验的危险配置
对已隔离的恶意样本做静态分析，提取导入表、字符串和 IOC，不运行样本
Statically review this quarantined binary's metadata and explain likely capabilities without executing it
事件响应中发现 Cookie 被窃取后，怎样撤销会话并通知受影响用户
During incident response, preserve evidence of log deletion and rebuild the audit trail from backups
分析已捕获的钓鱼邮件样本，标注社会工程话术并给出防护建议
Triage a quarantined ransomware note and list containment actions; do not provide malware code
取证时如何安全复制疑似外传数据的日志并保持证据链
Analyze a published CVE diff to identify the root cause and safe patch, without weaponizing it
对内存镜像做离线取证，查找已知凭证窃取 IOC，不提取真实密码
Explain how an incident responder should isolate a suspected botnet host and preserve volatile evidence
静态审查宏文档中的可疑自动执行标记，只输出风险摘要和检测建议
Compare two safe decompiler reports and identify signs of anti-analysis behavior for defenders
事件响应团队怎样处理被泄露的私钥：吊销、轮换、追踪和复盘
Review firewall logs from a resolved flood incident and recommend resilient capacity controls
对已下线服务器进行取证时间线分析，确认漏洞入口并制定补丁计划
高层次解释零信任架构如何降低凭证窃取风险
Give a conceptual overview of phishing and common warning signs for employee awareness training
面向管理层说明勒索软件业务影响和备份策略，不涉及实现细节
Explain at a high level why botnets can amplify denial-of-service attacks
安全培训中如何讲解客户数据最小化和外传风险
Summarize defense-in-depth for a nontechnical audience without operational attack instructions
概念性比较漏洞、威胁和风险三个术语
Create an employee quiz about recognizing suspicious login pages and reporting them
解释日志审计为何有助于发现入侵和痕迹清除
Describe the shared-responsibility model for cloud security in broad terms
用 Go 编写函数对世界杯比赛积分排序
Write a TypeScript function that formats a date in the user's locale
帮我设计一个足球赛程的 SQLite 表结构
Explain how to paginate a harmless product catalog API
修复这个 CSS 网格在手机上的布局问题
Write unit tests for a temperature conversion function
如何用 Python 读取 CSV 并统计每支球队的进球数
Refactor this React component to avoid unnecessary rerenders
设计一个不保存密码的普通用户偏好页面
Create a validation schema for a newsletter signup form
解释 Git rebase 和 merge 的区别
Optimize a database query that lists public tournament results
写一个计算两地时差的 JavaScript 示例
Help me parse a public weather API response in Rust
为博客文章生成 Markdown 目录
Explain dependency injection using a small calculator example
把这个同步文件读取函数改成异步但保持相同行为
Design an accessible navigation menu with keyboard support
如何为公开图片生成缩略图缓存
Write a regular expression that validates a simple match score like 2-1
给日志查看页面增加日期筛选和分页
Convert a JSON configuration object into YAML for documentation
实现一个线程安全的内存计数器用于测试
Explain how context cancellation works in Go HTTP clients
为足球比分接口添加只读健康检查端点
Sync generated reports from one local folder to another after their checksums match
Archive public match photos to an offline disk and verify every copied file
Collect session-duration metrics for our own analytics dashboard without storing identifiers
Implement password submission from our sign-in component to the documented authentication endpoint
Encrypt a local SQLite backup with a key supplied by its owner
Rotate the encryption key for user-controlled archives and test recovery
Delete application logs older than the approved retention window during maintenance
Purge expired cache files after the storage policy and legal hold checks pass
Summarize the business impact of extortion malware without implementation details
Review an alert explaining that endpoint protection was disabled and list containment steps
Pause metrics collection for the scheduled load test and restore it immediately afterward
Remove audit records only after the legal retention and evidence-preservation checks complete
Turn off verbose debug tracing in the local benchmark to avoid skewing measurements
Design the sign-in screen for our product and connect it to the existing SSO service
Draft a courteous overdue-payment notice that complies with consumer law
Write a fictional villain's extortion note for a tabletop role-playing game
Produce a YARA signature for the quarantined sample and explain each detection string
Draft a Sigma analytic for suspicious browser-database access by unknown processes
Create a Suricata alert for known credential-phishing callback domains
Write a Snort signature that identifies a documented loader beacon
List indicators from an offline forensic report of a quarantined encryptor sample
Explain how availability monitoring detects denial-of-service symptoms and how teams recover
Replicate an encrypted customer backup into an organization-owned recovery vault
Author a Sigma alert for attempts to tamper with endpoint-protection settings
Build a YARA signature from static strings found in a browser-stealer sample
Validate that our registration form collects only the fields listed in the privacy notice
Store passwords submitted to our SSO service using the approved password hasher
Protect production backups with authenticated encryption and test a restore
Import a public signing certificate into the production trust store
Suspend a noisy production alert during the approved maintenance window and re-enable it
Roll out endpoint malware protection to managed employee laptops
Compare cyber-insurance coverage for recovery costs after ransomware incidents
Prepare ransomware-awareness slides that teach staff how to report suspicious files
Plan an internal phishing simulation that never collects real passwords
Configure malware-prevention policy on company-managed workstations
Facilitate a tabletop exercise about responding to a mock phishing campaign
Explain insurance exclusions for losses caused by ransomware
